store_disaggregation_implicated: NO — predictions already per-store; collapse is flat cohort output not disaggregation

stage11_policy_cap_on_forecast_total: YES — 785 rows: forecast source >=3 crushed to selected=1 via policy_adjusted_total_cap_units ceiling in _build_download_forecast_outputs
